title: 🦠 Archetypal Virus Theory
name: Archetypal Virus Theory
what_it_is: The idea that archetypes spread like viral codes—memetic pattern-clusters infecting minds and cultures with myth payloads.
how_to_use: she carries an archetype infection—her presence triggers story loops in others
he’s a myth virus—anyone near dreams in symbols he carries
animation_behavior: Symbolic growth spreads from character, others begin mimicking visuals, myths replicate as light fractals ---
